title: phlegmariurus hastatus
intro: Phlegmariurus hastatus, also known as the Chinese spike moss, is a type of evergreen epiphytic plant that belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and boosting the immune system. Phlegmariurus hastatus is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture for its medicinal purposes.
